name: chain_i_set_up_6_ai_agents_that_sell_web_servi
method:
I set up 6 AI agents that sell web services 24/7 (full breakdown) I know "AI agents" sounds like tech bro nonsense so let me explain it simply.

ai agent is just an ai that does a specific task on its

stages.task: Scrape local businesses without websites or with bad websites from Google Maps, Yelp, industry directories. Target: restaurants, contractors, salons, clinics.
Score each prospect: has website? mobile-friendly? has Google Business? reviews count? Prioritize no-website or terrible-website businesses.
Find owner email/phone via Hunter.io free tier, public records, social profiles. Enrich with revenue signals.
Generate personalized cold email using claude -p. Reference their specific business, neighborhood, competitors who have better sites. Send via SMTP rotation.
Day 3 bump, Day 7 value-add (free audit screenshot of their Google listing vs competitor). Track opens/replies.
On reply: auto-generate proposal with 3 tiers ($500/$1500/$3000). Route hot leads to human for final close.
